name: Handshake Early Talent Recruiting API
what_it_does: Handshake early talent recruiting platform REST API for campus recruiting, internship management, and entry-level talent acquisition at 1,400+ universities. Enables AI agents to manage job posting and internship listing for campus talent sourcing, handle candidate profile search and filtering for early talent discovery, access event management and career fair coordination for campus recruiting operations, retrieve application tracking and status management for intern and entry-level hiring, manage employer brand and company profile for campus recruiting presence, handle virtual interview scheduling and candidate communication for recruiting workflow, access student diversity data and affinity group targeting for inclusive campus recruiting, retrieve talent analytics and campus pipeline reporting for recruiting intelligence, manage offer management and intern class coordination for entry-level hiring operations, and integrate Handshake with ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Workday) and HRIS for university talent workflow.
use_cases: Posting jobs from campus recruiting agents
Searching candidates from early talent agents
Coordinating events from campus recruiting agents
Tracking applications from intern hiring agents
not_for: Experienced professional recruiting (use LinkedIn or Indeed)
Executive search and senior leadership hiring
best_when: An employer, university career center, or staffing firm wanting AI agents to automate campus job posting, student candidate discovery, intern recruiting event management, and early talent pipeline management across 1,400+ university network.
avoid_when: STUDENT DATA FERPA PROTECTION: Handshake student profile data accessed by employers comes with FERPA student consent; automated bulk download or storage of student demographic and academic data must respect FERPA consent scope and privacy limitations. EEO AND DISPARATE IMPACT IN CAMPUS TARGETING: Automated campus recruiting targeting by school tier, major, or GPA without disparate impact analysis can systematically exclude protected class candidates; automated targeting without EEO review creates EEOC charge risk. AGE DISCRIMINATION FOR STUDENT CANDIDATES: Automated candidate filtering must not use graduation year as a proxy for age; ADEA and state age discrimination laws prohibit targeting based on graduation class in ways that exclude candidates over 40. Student data resale prohibition — Handshake terms prohibit resale or redistribution of student profile data obtained through the platform; automated bulk export and sharing of student data violates platform terms and FERPA.

auth.notes: Handshake uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2014. Private (Spark Capital, Kleiner Perkins, Lightspeed VC, and strategic investors). 1,400+ university partner network. 10M+ students and alumni. 650,000+ employers. Early talent recruiting market leader. Competes with LinkedIn Early Careers, WayUp, and campus-specific platforms for early talent recruiting.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free basic employer posting; Plus and Premium plans for sourcing and analytics features
pricing.paid_tiers: Plus and Premium annual subscription; enterprise campus recruiting packages
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Spark Capital/Kleiner/Lightspeed. Founded 2014. 1,400+ university partners. 10M+ students. 650,000+ employers. Free basic tier. Paid sourcing and analytics plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth scope; candidate search and export rate limits enforced; documented per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA STUDENT DATA USE LIMITATION: Handshake employer API access to student profiles is governed by FERPA student consent; automated bulk download or storage of student demographic and academic data beyond recruiting purpose violates FERPA consent scope; implement data minimization and purpose limitation for automated student data access

ADEA GRADUATION YEAR PROXY: Automated candidate filtering by graduation year ranges that exclude recent graduates beyond 4-5 years ago can serve as proxy for age discrimination against candidates over 40; automated graduation year cutoffs must be analyzed for ADEA compliance before deployment

EEO disparate impact for school selection — automated campus recruiting limited to specific school tiers (Ivy League, flagship state universities) may systematically exclude minority and first-generation candidates; automated school targeting must be tested for disparate impact

Candidate search rate limits — Handshake candidate search API enforces rate limits and export volume caps per partner tier; automated bulk candidate searches without pagination and rate limit awareness can trigger temporary API access suspension

Student data resale prohibition — Handshake platform terms strictly prohibit resale or redistribution of student profile data; automated workflows that export student data to third-party data providers violate platform terms and FERPA

ATS integration sync timing — Handshake ATS integration for application tracking has sync intervals; automated hiring decisions that depend on real-time Handshake application status must account for sync delay with ATS system of record
agent_readiness.security_notes: Early talent recruiting. FERPA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Student profile and recruiting data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Campus recruiting. FERPA, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Student and early talent data.
